metadata.name: Coming of Age
metadata.author: hyperbolic
metadata.description: After fleeing your home, you find yourself in a strange land with nothing but a pocket full of rocks, a few polished sticks, and some half-remembered spells. To the north, a town rises against a wild and untamed backdrop. Guttural grunts carry on the wind. What will you do?

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Nettlevale
towns.description: A hillside town whose cobbled streets wind between stone cottages.

key_dungeons.name: Lost Tomb
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Lost Tomb. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge Lost Tomb of evil and secure the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.
